headline: Is Zoetis Inc. (ZTS) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is ZTS a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Zoetis Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by ringdingjinglejangle. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ZTS. Zoetis Inc.’s share was trading at $75.89 as of June 22nd. ZTS’s trailing and forward P/E were 12.44 and 11.10 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Zoetis […]
